name: Test Deployer SSH Setup
description: Bootstraps the test-proxvex-deployer container with SSH access to the PVE host before first start. Mirrors install-proxvex.sh's SSH setup: generate Ed25519 keypair in /secure/.ssh, add pubkey to PVE root's authorized_keys, populate known_hosts via ssh-keyscan. Only needed for the test-proxvex-deployer overlay; production deployers get this from install-proxvex.sh.
